title: fix: add permission denied handling for dataset pages
summary: Adds 403/permission-denied handling to all dataset pages in the playground, which were the only resource missing this pattern. Adds is403ForbiddenError checks and PermissionDenied component to 9 dataset pages (list, detail, item, experiment, versions, comparisons). Also updates the generated permissions file to include datasets:read/write/delete plus several other new resource permissions (embeddings, processor-providers, stored, tool-providers, vectors). Includes a changeset for @mastra/core, @mastra/playground-ui, and @mastra/playground as patch bumps.
maintainerNotes: Approved by rphansen91. CI has 2 failures (Observability Package Tests, Validate peer dependencies) that appear unrelated to this PR's UI-only changes. 4 checks still pending (Combined store Tests, Memory Tests, Full Test Suite, E2E Tests). CodeRabbit flagged a potential duplicate 403 error check block in dataset/item/index.tsx — worth verifying before merge. The pattern is consistent with how other resources handle permission denied (agents, workflows, tools, etc.). No tests added, but this is a straightforward UI guard pattern already established elsewhere.
